About the founder

Meet the founder of Enlighten.

I'm the founder of Enlighten, a learning experience designer who builds business simulations and serious games. My background spans instructional design, capability development and organizational learning strategy — delivered for leading organizations across the region.

An engineer by training and a learning strategist by craft, I combine competency-based design with storytelling and game mechanics to turn corporate training into measurable capability that sticks.

What Enlighten delivers

Training & Simulation, end to end.

From a single workshop to a full capability program — design, build and delivery under one roof.

🧩

Learning Experience Design

Competency-based learning journeys aligned to real business roles and outcomes — not just content.

🎲

Business Simulations

Decision-driven simulations where learners run a business, feel the consequences and debrief the insights.

🕹️

Serious & Board Games

Custom physical and digital games — from board design to fully coded multiplayer experiences.

🎤

Facilitation & Train-the-Trainer

Facilitator guides, trainer kits and live delivery that make any team able to run the experience.

📊

Assessment Design

Scenario-based assessments and scoring rubrics that measure capability, not memorization.

🗺️

Career & Capability Mapping

Role architecture, skill maps and career pathways integrated into your learning platform.

Financial Wellness

Psychology of Money

Business sim3 roundsSingle / group

Start with 540 zenzen and build a trading business — buy products, invest in cars and retails, hire the right team, and survive accidents, depreciation and a tempting Year-3 loan. Every choice flows into a live financial statement.

📅 Book a demo Outcome: real financial intuition
Live preview
⚠️
⚠ Crisis unfolding…Served 0/4
Crisis & Decision-Making

Aftermath

MultiplayerMap-basedTeam play

A multiplayer crisis simulation. Teams race across a living map to serve customers, manage limited resources and make hard calls under pressure — then see how their decisions ripple through the aftermath.

📅 Book a demo Outcome: decisions under pressure
Live preview

Leadership & Self-Awareness

DISC-Based Leadership

PersonalityBoard + digitalTeam building

A role-play simulation built on the DISC model. Players step into characters, navigate workplace scenarios and discover how Dominance, Influence, Steadiness and Conscientiousness shape the way teams actually work together.

📅 Book a demo Outcome: adaptive leadership

Roll the dice of life 🎲
Life Skills & Choices

Ticket to Life

Life-design gameBoardYouth & early career

A journey-of-life board game where every square is a real decision — education, money, career and relationships. Players experience the long-term payoff of the choices they make, one roll at a time.

📅 Book a demo Outcome: choices have consequences

How we work together

From brief to "wow" in four steps.

Discover

We map your objectives, audience and the behaviours you want to change.

Design

I storyboard the experience — mechanics, scenarios, assessment and debrief.

Build

Physical kits and digital simulations are produced, tested and polished.

Deliver

Facilitation, train-the-trainer and the materials to run it again and again.

Let's build something

Book a demo or start a project.

Tell me what you're trying to teach — I'll show you how a simulation can make it land. Every message comes straight to my inbox.
